headline: Mondelez's Chocolate Sales Show Strength in FY25: Is It Sustainable?
summary: MDLZ's chocolate sales rise 11.4% in 2025 as pricing offsets cocoa cost pressure, but volume declines raise questions about how durable that growth is.

headline: Rothschild & Co Downgrades Mondelez International to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $55
summary: Rothschild & Co  analyst Bingqing Zhu   downgrades Mondelez International (NASDAQ:MDLZ) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $71 to $55.
